title: A cold welcome
question: 把今天课文里“公共倒计时失灵”放进广场大屏、旧式大钟和跨年笑点——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: A large crowd gathered in the square to watch the countdown screen. It stopped at the last moment, but everyone still began to laugh and sing.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 公共倒计时：人群聚在广场看大屏
options.english_template: A large crowd had gathered in the square to watch the ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 旧式大钟：11:55 时分针停住
options.english_template: At five to twelve, the big clock stopped, and the ___ did not move.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 新年笑点：已经过了零点，大家转为欢笑
options.english_template: When someone saw it was already two minutes past twelve, everybody began to ___.
